title: God Bless Our Good And Gracious King
content:
God bless our good and gracious kind,
Whose promise none relies on,
Who never said a foolish thing,
Nor ever did a wise one.
meaning:
"God Bless Our Good And Gracious King" is a quintessential example of John Wilmot's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
